en: He made deals with book clubs, charity groups.
He bought remaindered books by the pound.
ko: 그는 남은 책을 파운드 단위로 샀어.

en: I got here, uh, auto repair and...
Soap carving. Trade skills and hobbies. Goes under educational.
ko: 비누 조각. 직업 기술과 취미. 교육 카테고리에 들어가.
너 뒤에 쌓여 있는 거. 몬테크리스토 백작.

en: That's Cristo, you dumb shit. By Alexandre...
Dumas. You know what that's about? Uh-uh.
You'll like it. It's about a prison break. Won't be able to find that under educational, too.
ko: 너 좋아할 거야. 탈옥에 대한 이야기야. 교육 카테고리에서는 찾을 수 없을 거야.
